title: Mr. Kumar's Habits
description: Frequency adverbs (always, usually, often, sometimes, rarely, never) and where they go in a sentence.
summary_pt_br: Advérbios de frequência: always / usually / often / sometimes / rarely / never. Regra da posição: vão ANTES do verbo principal, mas DEPOIS do verbo 'to be' ('She is always late', mas 'She always arrives late').

scenes.chapter: Chapter 39 — Always, Never, and In Between

scenes.text_en:
Mr. Kumar is predictable.
He ALWAYS drinks chai at 7 a.m.
He USUALLY opens the school at 8.
He OFTEN tells a story before class.
He SOMETIMES plays jazz on the rooftop speakers.
He RARELY stays late.
He NEVER skips his evening walk.
scenes.text_pt:
Mr. Kumar é previsível.
SEMPRE toma chai às 7h.
GERALMENTE abre a escola às 8.
FREQUENTEMENTE conta uma história antes da aula.
ÀS VEZES toca jazz nas caixas do terraço.
RARAMENTE fica até tarde.
NUNCA pula a caminhada da noite.

scenes.title: Position of frequency adverbs
scenes.body_en: Rule: BEFORE the main verb, AFTER the verb 'to be'. 'She ALWAYS arrives late.' (main verb = arrives) 'She is ALWAYS late.' (to be). Common mistake: 'I always am tired' — should be 'I am always tired'.
scenes.body_pt: Regra: ANTES do verbo principal, DEPOIS do verbo 'to be'. 'She ALWAYS arrives late' (verbo principal). 'She is ALWAYS late' (to be). Erro comum: 'I always am tired' → deve ser 'I am always tired'.

examples.en: I always wake up at 6. (main verb)
I don't usually eat breakfast. (between auxiliary and main)

exercise.question: Complete: 'She ___ goes to bed before 10.' (always, main verb)
exercise.explanation: Before the main verb 'goes'. 'She always goes...'
Frequency on a scale. Memorize the spectrum.

exercise.question: Complete: "I always study every ___."
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "I always study every evening."

exercise.question: Pick the best response. (OFTEN.)
options: Yes, I often watch movies in English.
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "Yes, I often watch movies in English."

scenes.title: Mr. Kumar's routine
scenes.pt_summary: Advérbios de frequência — always, usually, often, sometimes, never.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How often do you study English?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Do you ever practice with movies?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I often watch movies in English.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, sometimes, but I never give up.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How often do you speak English out loud?
turns.pt: Com que frequência fala em voz alta?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I usually speak out loud every day.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I rarely travel, but I want to travel more.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Mr. Kumar's Habits". Frequency adverbs (always, usually, often, sometimes, rarely, never) and where they go in a sentence. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Mr. Kumar's Habits". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Mr. Kumar's Habits'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Mr. Kumar's Habits".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
